_notes: Asset types are created in declaration order so that any 'parentKey' reference resolves.
'parentPublicId' refers to an OOTB Collibra asset type (e.g. 'BusinessAsset'). 'parentKey' refers to another DCAT3 type defined in this file.
If both parentKey and parentPublicId are absent, the asset type is created as a top-level type.

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Resource
assetTypes.description: Root for the DCAT-US 3.0 profile. Mirrors dcat:Resource. Common attributes (title, description, publisher, theme, keyword, access rights) inherit from here. Source URI: dcat:Resource

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Dataset
assetTypes.description: A conceptual entity that represents the information published. Source URI: dcat:Dataset

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Dataset Series
assetTypes.description: A collection of datasets that are published separately but share characteristics. Source URI: dcat:DatasetSeries

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Catalog
assetTypes.description: A curated collection of metadata about resources. Per spec, dcat:Catalog is a sub-class of dcat:Dataset. Source URI: dcat:Catalog

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Catalog Record
assetTypes.description: A record in a catalog, describing the registration of a single dcat:Resource. Source URI: dcat:CatalogRecord

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Distribution
assetTypes.description: A physical embodiment of the Dataset in a particular format. Source URI: dcat:Distribution

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Data Service
assetTypes.description: A collection of operations that provides access to one or more datasets or data processing functions. Source URI: dcat:DataService

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Agent
assetTypes.description: An entity (e.g. an individual or an organization) associated with Catalogs, Catalog Records, Data Services, or Datasets. Source URI: foaf:Agent

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Organization
assetTypes.description: A collection of people organized into a community or other social/commercial/political structure. Source URI: org:Organization

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Person
assetTypes.description: An individual human being. Source URI: foaf:Person

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Contact
assetTypes.description: Point of contact information following vCard. Source URI: vcard:Kind

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Concept
assetTypes.description: A controlled vocabulary term used to classify Catalog, Dataset, or Data Service. Source URI: skos:Concept

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Concept Scheme
assetTypes.description: A concept collection (e.g. controlled vocabulary). Source URI: skos:ConceptScheme

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Role
assetTypes.description: Function of a resource or agent with respect to another resource. Source URI: dcat:Role

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Media Type
assetTypes.description: A media type (e.g., the format of a computer file). Source URI: dcterms:MediaType

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Metric
assetTypes.description: A standard to measure a quality dimension. Source URI: dqv:Metric

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Standard
assetTypes.description: A standard or other specification a resource conforms to. Source URI: dcterms:Standard

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 License Document
assetTypes.description: A legal document giving official permission to do something with a resource. Source URI: dcterms:LicenseDocument

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Rights Statement
assetTypes.description: A statement about the IPR held in or over a resource. Source URI: dcterms:RightsStatement

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Provenance Statement
assetTypes.description: A statement of any changes in ownership and custody of a resource. Source URI: dcterms:ProvenanceStatement

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Access Restriction
assetTypes.description: [New in DCAT-US 3.0] NARA-defined limitations on accessing specific records. Source URI: dcat-us:AccessRestriction

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 CUI Restriction
assetTypes.description: [New in DCAT-US 3.0] Controlled Unclassified Information restriction per NARA. Source URI: dcat-us:CuiRestriction

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Use Restriction
assetTypes.description: [New in DCAT-US 3.0] Rules dictating how a resource can be utilized. Source URI: dcat-us:UseRestriction

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Liability Statement
assetTypes.description: [New in DCAT-US 3.0] Formal declaration of responsibilities and limitations of the data provider. Source URI: dcat-us:LiabilityStatement

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Checksum
assetTypes.description: A value that allows the contents of a file to be authenticated. Source URI: spdx:Checksum

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Identifier
assetTypes.description: [New in DCAT-US 3.0] An identifier in a particular context. Source URI: adms:Identifier

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Activity
assetTypes.description: An activity carried out by an Agent over an entity. Source URI: prov:Activity

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Attribution
assetTypes.description: A responsibility of an Agent for a resource. Source URI: prov:Attribution

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Quality Measurement
assetTypes.description: Evaluation of a resource against a specific quality metric. Source URI: dqv:QualityMeasurement

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Location
assetTypes.description: A spatial region or named place. Source URI: dcterms:Location

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Address (Location)
assetTypes.description: The address of a location. Source URI: locn:Address

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Address (Contact Point)
assetTypes.description: A postal address for a Contact Point. Source URI: vcard:Address

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Geographic Bounding Box
assetTypes.description: [New in DCAT-US 3.0] Spatial extent in WGS 84 Lat/Long. Source URI: dcat-us:GeographicBoundingBox

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Period of Time
assetTypes.description: An interval of time named or defined by its start and end dates. Source URI: dcterms:PeriodOfTime

assetTypes.name: DCAT3 Document
assetTypes.description: A textual resource intended for human consumption. Source URI: foaf:Document
